title_ko: 한글을 만든 세종대왕 이야기와 한글의 과학적 원리
title_en: The Story of King Sejong and the Scientific Principles of Hangeul

scenes.ko: 안녕하세요! 오늘은 한국의 아주 특별한 문자, 한글에 대해 이야기할 거예요. 한글은 세상에서 가장 과학적인 글자 중 하나로 꼽힌답니다.
scenes.en: Hello everyone! Today, we're going to talk about a very special writing system from Korea, Hangeul. Hangeul is considered one of the most scientific alphabets in the world.
scenes.cap_en: Hello! Shall we start the Hangeul story?
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook cheomseongdae from a low angle, surrounded by various ancient korean astronomical tools, a gentle bird flying, flower field, night lighting, stars, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 이 아름다운 한글을 만드신 분은 바로 조선 시대의 위대한 왕, 세종대왕이세요. 백성들이 쉽게 글을 읽고 쓸 수 있도록 직접 한글을 창제하셨죠.
scenes.en: The one who created this beautiful Hangeul is the great king of the Joseon Dynasty, King Sejong. He personally invented Hangeul so that common people could easily read and write.
scenes.cap_en: The great King Sejong created Hangeul.
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook cheomseongdae, a close-up on the base with an open ancient scroll, flower field, night lighting, stars, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 한글은 백성들의 소통을 돕기 위해 만들어진, 사랑과 지혜가 담긴 문자랍니다. 배우기 쉬워 누구나 금방 익힐 수 있었어요.
scenes.en: Hangeul is a writing system filled with love and wisdom, created to help people communicate. It was easy to learn, so anyone could quickly master it.
scenes.cap_en: Hangeul, made with love and wisdom
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook cheomseongdae, a wide shot with a small group of ancient korean scholars discussing in the distance, flower field, night lighting, stars, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 가장 놀라운 점은 한글이 자연의 소리, 즉 발음 기관의 모양을 본떠서 만들어졌다는 거예요. 모음은 '천지인' 삼재 사상을 바탕으로 해요.
scenes.en: The most amazing thing is that Hangeul was created by imitating the sounds of nature, specifically the shapes of our vocal organs. Vowels are based on the 'Cheonjiin' philosophy of the Three Powers.
scenes.cap_en: The secret of Hangeul, Cheonjiin vowels!
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook cheomseongdae, an eye-level view with a clear night sky showing stars and constellations, flower field, night lighting, stars, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: '·'은 하늘을, 'ㅡ'는 땅을, 'ㅣ'는 사람을 상징해요. 이 세 가지 기본 형태로 모든 모음 글자가 만들어진답니다.
scenes.en: The dot '·' symbolizes the sky, the horizontal line 'ㅡ' the earth, and the vertical line 'ㅣ' a person. All vowel letters are created from these three basic forms.
scenes.cap_en: Sky, Earth, Person: The basics of vowels!
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook cheomseongdae, a close-up on the middle section with glowing symbols of heaven, earth, and human appearing around it, flower field, night lighting, stars, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 자음은 입술, 혀, 목구멍 같은 발음 기관의 모양을 본떠 만들었어요. 예를 들어, 'ㄱ'은 혀가 목구멍을 막는 모양에서 영감을 받았죠.
scenes.en: Consonants were created by imitating the shapes of vocal organs like the lips, tongue, and throat. For example, 'ㄱ' was inspired by the shape of the tongue blocking the throat.
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook cheomseongdae, from a slightly high angle overlooking a small traditional korean village, flower field, night lighting, stars, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 이처럼 한글은 배우기 쉬울 뿐만 아니라, 소리를 시각적으로 표현하는 뛰어난 체계를 가지고 있어요. 전 세계 언어학자들도 그 우수성을 인정했죠.
scenes.en: As such, Hangeul is not only easy to learn but also has an excellent system for visually representing sounds. Linguists worldwide have recognized its superiority.
scenes.cap_en: The scientific excellence of Hangeul recognized globally!
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook cheomseongdae, a distant shot showcasing the entire structure under a clear, star-filled night sky, flower field, night lighting, stars, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 오늘 우리가 한국어를 쉽고 빠르게 배울 수 있는 것도 바로 이 한글 덕분이에요. 정말 고마운 문자죠?
scenes.en: It is thanks to Hangeul that we can learn Korean easily and quickly today. It's truly a thankful writing system, isn't it?
scenes.cap_en: Thanks to Hangeul, learning Korean is easy!
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook cheomseongdae, a medium shot with a cozy campfire nearby, flower field, night lighting, stars, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 한글이 전 세계에 더 많이 알려지고 사랑받기를 바라며, 오늘의 이야기를 마칠게요. 다음에 또 만나요!
scenes.en: I hope Hangeul becomes more widely known and loved around the world. That concludes today's story. See you next time!
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook cheomseongdae, a beautiful sunset view with glowing lanterns illuminating the path, flower field, night lighting, stars, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9
